title: hieracium caesium subsp. minuriens
intro: Hieracium caesium subsp. minuriens, commonly known as small hawk's beard, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to Europe. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been used to treat various health issues. The plant has been traditionally used to alleviate conditions such as digestive problems, respiratory issues, and skin irritations, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and protecting against cell damage. Herbal preparations of Hieracium caesium subsp. minuriens often involve infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other remedies for topical and internal use.
